summary:
Daprodustat effectively treats anemia of chronic kidney disease by inducing endogenous erythropoietin production through HIF stabilization. It is FDA-approved for use in dialysis-dependent patients, establishing its clinical efficacy in this specific patient群体.  

\boxed{A}

Final Summary:  
Daprodustat treats anemia of chronic kidney disease by increasing endogenous erythropoietin via HIF stabilization. It is FDA-approved for use in dialysis patients, confirming its clinical effectiveness in this population.
